title: festuca geniculata var. ciliata
intro: Festuca geniculata var. ciliata, also known as the bent grass or bent grass fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Festuca geniculata var. ciliata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions, teas, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
